zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Mugge於1488年出生在英國素瑞吉爾德福德聖 馬也斯 邱奇時，她的父親Walter Mudge28歲，母親Johanna Broke40歲。她於1503年與Sir Christopher More在英國英格蘭波克夏格亞特 可維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭德比夏爾諾頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞吉爾德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Mugge于1488年出生在英国素瑞吉爾德福德聖 馬也斯 邱奇时，她的父亲Walter Mudge28岁，母亲Johanna Broke40岁。她于1503年与Sir Christopher More在英国英格兰波克夏格亞特 可維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰德比夏爾諾頓，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞吉爾德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Mugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Mudge  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Mudge
meanings: English (Devon): nickname from Middle English mugge, either a southwestern dialect form of Old English mycg ‘midge, fly’ or (anywhere in England) representing an unrecorded Old English mugga (probably attested in Old English mugwyrt ‘mugwort’) with the same meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Mugge was born in 1488, in St Mary's Church, Guildford, Surrey, England, her father, Walter Mudge, was 28 and her mother, Johanna Broke, was 40. She married Sir Christopher More in 1503, in Great Coxwell, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in Norton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Guildford, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir Christopher More en 1503, à Great Coxwell, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée à Norton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Guildford, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Muggeが1488年にイギリススリーグイルドフォードスト マリ'ス チャーチで生まれた時，父Walter Mudgeは28歳，母Johanna Brokeは40歳であった。1503年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアグレアト コクスウエルでSir Christopher Moreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアノートンで死去し，イギリスイギリススリーグイルドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Guildford Saint Mary, Guildford, Surrey,: 영국 수리 길드퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mugge(이)가 1488년 영국 수리 길드퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Mudge(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Broke(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 그리트 콕스웰에서 Sir Christopher More(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 노르턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 길드퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher More em 1503, em Great Coxwell, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Guildford Saint Mary, Guildford, Surrey,: ст мэри'с чурч, гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Mugge родилась в 1488 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Mudge было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Broke, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher More в 1503 г. в местности грит коксвелл, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в местности нортон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.
